metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2086
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The study documents the localization of MCT2 at a variety of glutamatergic synapses using immunogold localization electron microscopy. MCT2 is detected at Schaffer collateral/commissural fibre synapses in CA1, recurrent collateral/commissural fibre synapses in CA3, cerebellar parallel fibre/Purkinje cell synapses (mouse), and to a lesser extent mossy fibre synapses. It is absent from symmetric synapses.

11/12/2017 Pim
- Based on the known transmembrane topology of the protein, the "integral component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: ... it is demonstrated that MCT2 is present at postsynaptic density of asymmetric
synapses, in the stratum radiatum of both rat hippocampal CA1 and CA3 regions, as well as at parallel fibre-Purkinje cell synapses in mouse cerebellum (Abstract, p. 361).
